expected.notes: Foreign-owned SMLLC missing Form 5472 triggers warning; is_nra=yes derived from owner_residency=nonresident_alien.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'missing_5472'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr
  - answers.entity_type eq smllc
  - extraction_b.form_5472_present eq False
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
